body.title: Self-training loop habit
body.result: self_trainer.py fixed: (1) interaction logs found in correct path ~/.TheIgors/local/logs/ (2) CC: prefix extraction + routing directive strip (3) GAP_KEYWORD_THRESHOLD 1→3 (4) DB-based signal from EPISODIC used_api=true added as supplementary source (5) _deposit() now uses new_node_id(). PROC_SELF_TRAINING seeded. Manual pass: scanned=37 covered=34 gaps=3 deposited=3. Deposits in DB with timestamp IDs.
body.description: Threshold habit fires after N cloud calls → reads own turn traces → finds inhibition misses that escalated to tier>=3 → deposits targeted knowledge to fill those exact gaps → graph densifies → next time no escalation. Gap signal = twm.check_result=miss AND tier>=3 in turn trace. Prerequisites: T-db-populate-embeddings + T-db-type-routing (matrix must be searchable for deposits to be retrievable). Unlocks both fork 1 (reply from graph) and fork 2 (design/code from graph).
